name: Portland General Electric Company
description: Portland General Electric Company (PGE) is a vertically integrated electric utility based in Portland, Oregon. The company is engaged in the generation, wholesale purchase, transmission, distribution, and retail sale of electricity, serving approximately 900,000 customers across a significant portion of Oregon. As a publicly traded energy company, PGE is committed to powering lives while focusing on social, economic, and environmental progress. It plays a critical role in the Pacific Northwest's energy infrastructure, managing a diverse portfolio of power resources to provide reliable electricity to residential, commercial, and industrial clients throughout its service territory.
